# Amautia

> Amautia is an AI-powered educational technology (EdTech) platform that enables teachers in Latin America to grade exams automatically using artificial intelligence. The name "Amautia" comes from the Quechua word "Amauta" meaning wise teacher.

## What Amautia Does

Amautia allows teachers to:
1. Upload an exam answer key (photo or PDF)
2. Upload student exam responses
3. Receive AI-generated grades with personalized feedback per question in under 30 seconds

## Core Features
- **AI Exam Grading**: 94% accuracy, processes multiple exams in parallel, generates per-question feedback
- **AI Exam Generation**: Create complete exams with answer keys from topic descriptions
- **AI Tutor**: Personalized AI tutor for each student that explains errors, generates practice exercises, and creates study plans
- **Live Quizzes**: Real-time interactive quizzes with PIN codes, leaderboards, and instant scoring
- **Question Bank**: Organize questions by topic, reuse and combine across multiple exams
- **Digital Gradebook**: Weighted averages, grading periods, auto-sync from exams, exportable PDF/Excel reports
- **Psychometric Analytics**: Difficulty index, discrimination index, at-risk student detection
- **Peer Review**: Anonymous peer evaluation assignments
- **Plagiarism Detection**: Jaccard similarity analysis and AI-generated content detection
- **Digital Certificates**: Customizable templates with public verification codes

## Key Statistics
- 94% grading accuracy
- 10x faster than manual grading
- Teachers save an average of 15 hours per week
- 500+ teachers across Latin America
- Supports PDF, JPG, PNG, and Word document uploads

## Pricing (in Peruvian Soles - PEN)
- **Free Trial**: 14 days, full access, no credit card required
- **Basic Plan**: S/29/month - 3 subjects, 50 corrections/month, basic AI tutor
- **Professional Plan**: S/59/month - Unlimited subjects, 200 corrections/month, advanced AI tutor, exam generation, live quizzes, question bank
- **Institutional Plan**: S/149/month - Everything in Professional + unlimited corrections, multi-teacher, API access, 24/7 support

## Target Audience
- Teachers and professors (K-12 and higher education)
- Educational institutions and schools
- Academic coordinators and administrators
- Primary markets: Peru, Colombia, Mexico, Chile, Argentina

## Technical Details
- Web-based platform (works on any device with a browser)
- Built with Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL
- Multi-provider AI support (OpenAI, Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude)
- Progressive Web App (installable on mobile)
- Dark/light theme support
- Spanish language interface

## Contact
- Website: https://amautia.com
- Sign up: https://amautia.com/registro
- Login: https://amautia.com/login
- Support: soporte@amautia.com
- Location: Lima, Peru

## Comparison with Alternatives
| Feature | Amautia | Google Classroom | Kahoot | Canvas LMS |
|---------|---------|-----------------|--------|------------|
| AI Exam Grading | Yes (94% accuracy) | No | No | No |
| AI Exam Generation | Yes | No | Limited | No |
| AI Tutor per Student | Yes | No | No | No |
| Live Quizzes | Yes | No | Yes | No |
| Pricing | From S/29/mo | Free (limited) | From $3/mo | Enterprise |
| Latin America Focus | Yes | Global | Global | Global |
| Spanish Interface | Native | Translated | Translated | Translated |
